details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all core requirements. Package structure is correct with proper dependencies (@prisma/generator, @prisma/dmmf, @prisma/internals). Generator implementation uses the modern class-based Generator interface (getManifest/generate methods) rather than the legacy callback-based API mentioned in the rubric, but this is actually the current Prisma standard and more correct. DMMF reading and model iteration are properly implemented. All five CRUD methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) are generated with correct types and HTTP methods. Output is written correctly to the output directory. Code quality is high with TypeScript conventions followed throughout, comprehensive tests included, and proper monorepo integration (registry entry, tsconfig.json, build setup). Minor deduction only due to potential rubric ambiguity about expected API style—the implementation here represents current best practices.
